semantics: Maintained evidence graph. A specimen edge names a qualifying UNDERCAST transformation and its record. A context edge is citable connective evidence but never grants wall eligibility. Structure edges only organize sourced works and franchises.

nodes.label: Breaking Bad / Better Call Saul
nodes.description: The Albuquerque crime-story continuity shared by Breaking Bad and Better Call Saul.

constellations.title: Albuquerque in space
constellations.summary: Three performers connect Star Trek to Breaking Bad and Better Call Saul. Two disappear beneath designed alien faces and belong on the wall; one remains visible as a Human Starfleet soldier and belongs here only as sourced context.

constellations.title: Every filed Ferengi performer
constellations.summary: 46 named performers across 65 sourced role credits: 57 physical performances and 8 voice credits. Polished wall records and filed discovery anchors remain visibly distinct.
